caption: A woman with her hair styled in a high bun and curly lengths sits in a studio setting, wearing a dark green t-shirt featuring a red circular graphic. She wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned behind a professional black microphone. In the background, banners feature the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST," along with the phrase "About It!" and the smaller text "It's A Utique Hustle." To the left of the woman, a small desk sign displays "BOSS TALK 101" and "CEO." Throughout the sequence, the woman maintains a slight smile and looks toward someone off-screen to her left. Her posture and facial expression remain relatively consistent across the frames, with only subtle shifts in her gaze and a slight tilt of her head as she listens or prepares to speak.
